name: vessica
description: Set up and operate hosted Vessica workspaces, durable general agents, engineering runs, evidence, previews, harnesses, and knowledge through the ves CLI.

interface.shortDescription: Set up and operate hosted engineering workflows through ves.
interface.longDescription: Use the version-matched ves Go CLI to create or recover a Railway-hosted Vessica workspace, build and invoke durable general agents, attach repositories, manage engineering harnesses, run and refine cloud coding workflows, restore ambiguity-safe shared knowledge, and review persisted evidence before approval or rollback.
defaultPrompt: Set up Vessica in this repository.
Turn this request into a Vessica epic.
Show me the status of my Vessica runs.
Review the artifacts and receipt for this Vessica run.
What does Vessica remember about this repository?
Create a persistent Vessica agent for this workflow.
Show me the available Vessica agents and invoke the best match.
Help me configure or troubleshoot Vessica.
